runners.formComment: Drawn inside box. At the last outing finished last over 425m at this track beaten 14 lengths (25.28) behind Nicky's Secret in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on March 14. Well placed and among the chances here.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 2 over 425m at this track behind Aunty Cheryl beaten 11 lengths (25.10) in a Grade 5. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

runners.formComment: Returned to racing last start with a poor run finished 6th over 390m at Ballarat beaten 12 lengths (23.26) behind Kiani Star in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11. Prepared to overlook.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 425m at this track behind Alice From Venus beaten 1.75 lengths (24.71). Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 425m at this track behind Alice From Venus beaten 1.75 lengths (24.71). Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 9 over 400m at Warragul behind Quick Response beaten 6 lengths (23.62) in a Grade 5. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 9 over 400m at Warragul behind Quick Response beaten 6 lengths (23.62) in a Grade 5. Has been racing well. Well placed here and looks a leading contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.

runners.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished seventh over 425m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished seventh over 425m at this track, beaten 6 lengths. Hard to have this time.

runners.formComment: Didn't finish two back and couldn't make the frame last time when he finished 7th in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on April 8 over 350m at Healesville behind Paw Farok beaten 8 lengths (20.08). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 9 length sixth over 410m at Horsham. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Lost ground in home straight.
Checked in back straight and lost ground.
